raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1444 requires that listing services provide clear and accurate information about contacting a restaurant.",
    "AB 1444 prohibits food delivery platforms from charging restaurants for routed calls that do not result in a paid order.",
    "The disclosure mandated by AB 1444 allows consumers to make conscientious decisions when placing an order.",
    "According to the California Asian Pacific Chamber of Commerce, 41% of phone orders in California from Grubhub come from Asian restaurants.",
    "Asian restaurants have been disproportionately impacted by the pandemic due to the xenophobic narrative surrounding COVID-19.",
    "AB 286 requires delivery platforms to disclose an itemized breakdown of fees charged in transactions."
  ]
}
```
